tasks.subject: Task 1: Scaffold ahand-platform crate, paths module, .gitattributes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Workspace builds with new crate; exe_name/simplify/canonicalize_simplified tested; CRLF-safe repo.

**Verify:** cargo test -p ahand-platform && cargo check --workspace && cargo check --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc -p ahand-platform

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Cargo.toml", ".gitattributes", "crates/ahand-platform/Cargo.toml", "crates/ahand-platform/src/lib.rs", "crates/ahand-platform/src/paths.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahand-platform && cargo check --workspace && cargo check --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc -p ahand-platform", "acceptanceCriteria": ["crate in workspace", "paths helpers tested", "msvc check green", "gitattributes forces LF"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: platform::process + adopt in ahandctl daemon lifecycle
tasks.description:
**Goal:** configure_detached/terminate/is_process_running in platform crate; daemon.rs cfg-free.

**Verify:** cargo test -p ahand-platform -p ahandctl && cargo check --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc -p ahandctl

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahand-platform/src/process.rs", "crates/ahandctl/Cargo.toml", "crates/ahandctl/src/daemon.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahand-platform -p ahandctl && cargo check --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc -p ahandctl", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no cfg in daemon.rs", "libc kill on unix, taskkill on windows", "exe_name used for binary lookup"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: platform::signals + adopt in ahandd main
tasks.description:
**Goal:** shutdown_signal() unified; main.rs loses tokio::signal::unix.

**Verify:** cargo test -p ahand-platform && cargo build -p ahandd && cargo check --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc -p ahandd (later-task files may still error; record)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahand-platform/src/signals.rs", "crates/ahandd/Cargo.toml", "crates/ahandd/src/main.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahand-platform && cargo build -p ahandd", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no signal::unix in ahandd", "select! uses shutdown future"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: platform::shell + adopt in executor and openclaw handler
tasks.description:
**Goal:** SHELL//bin/sh vs COMSPEC/cmd.exe via default_shell/env_shell/shell_c_flag; call sites adopted; tool_resolution_tests cfg-aware.

**Verify:** cargo test -p ahandd && cargo test -p ahand-platform shell

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahand-platform/src/shell.rs", "crates/ahandd/src/executor.rs", "crates/ahandd/src/openclaw/handler.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahandd && cargo test -p ahand-platform shell", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no hardcoded /bin/sh in production code", "existing unix behavior unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Policy verbatim-prefix fix (\\?\)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** canonicalize results simplified before glob matching; regression test pinning allowlisted tempdir passes check_path.

**Verify:** cargo test -p ahandd file_manager && cargo test -p ahandd --test file_ops

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandd/src/file_manager/policy.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahandd file_manager && cargo test -p ahandd --test file_ops", "acceptanceCriteria": ["simplify applied in canonicalize_or_parent both branches", "regression test added"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: platform::secure_file + route all three secret writers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** write_secure_file (0o600 unix / icacls owner-only windows, temp+rename); device_identity x2 + pairing routed; no 0o600 left in ahandd.

**Verify:** cargo test -p ahand-platform secure_file && cargo test -p ahandd && grep -rn 0o600 crates/ahandd/src/ returns nothing

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahand-platform/src/secure_file.rs", "crates/ahandd/src/device_identity.rs", "crates/ahandd/src/openclaw/device_identity.rs", "crates/ahandd/src/openclaw/pairing.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahand-platform secure_file && cargo test -p ahandd", "acceptanceCriteria": ["mode set before write on unix", "icacls hard-errors", "hello_signature golden test still green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: platform::ipc module (transport only, loopback tests)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** IpcEndpoint/IpcListener/ipc_connect with unix socket / named pipe; loopback roundtrip test.

**Verify:** cargo test -p ahand-platform ipc && cargo check --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc -p ahand-platform && clippy -D warnings

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahand-platform/src/ipc.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahand-platform ipc && cargo check --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc -p ahand-platform", "acceptanceCriteria": ["default endpoint per-user", "pipe instance pre-created before accept returns", "ERROR_PIPE_BUSY retry on connect"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Adopt platform::ipc in ahandd server + ahandctl client
tasks.description:
**Goal:** serve_ipc on IpcListener; handle_ipc_conn generic; config returns IpcEndpoint (no /tmp); 5 ahandctl ipc_* connect sites use ipc_connect; manual IPC smoke on macOS.

**Verify:** cargo test -p ahandd -p ahandctl && cargo check --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc -p ahandd -p ahandctl (errors only in Task9/M3 files)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandd/src/ipc.rs", "crates/ahandd/src/config.rs", "crates/ahandd/src/main.rs", "crates/ahandctl/src/main.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahandd -p ahandctl", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no UnixListener/UnixStream/PermissionsExt in ahandd ipc.rs", "into_split replaced by tokio::io::split", "smoke test passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Updater + remaining /tmp fallbacks + save_atomic
tasks.description:
**Goal:** install_binary_into with .exe + rename-aside + cleanup_old_binary startup hook; windows restart via detached spawn + exit; browser.rs /tmp -> temp_dir; save_atomic overwrite test.

**Verify:** cargo test -p ahandd updater && cargo test -p ahandd config && no /tmp literals outside tests

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandd/src/updater.rs", "crates/ahandd/src/main.rs", "crates/ahandd/src/browser.rs", "crates/ahandd/src/config.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahandd updater && cargo test -p ahandd config", "acceptanceCriteria": ["rename-aside on windows", "startup cleanup hook wired", "no /tmp in client production code"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: CI — 3-OS client test lane + Windows release artifacts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** client-ci.yml (ubuntu/macos/windows: fmt/clippy/test); release-rust.yml windows-x64 + protoc + .exe artifacts; iterate until Windows lane green — this is the M1 gate.

**Verify:** gh run watch both workflows green on branch

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/client-ci.yml", ".github/workflows/release-rust.yml"], "verifyCommand": "gh run list --branch feat/cross-platform-support", "acceptanceCriteria": ["windows test job green incl. policy regression test", "release dry-run builds ahandd-windows-x64.exe"]}
```
